methodology: OpenStreetMap POI search within 50-200km radius of representative centers for each underserved region. Categories: amenity, health, shop, office. Prosthetic-orthotic-specific amenity tags (CPO) searched explicitly; zero results in all three regions.

regions.name: Rural West Virginia
regions.nearestHospital: Beckley Appalachian Regional Hospital (in-county, no CPO services)
keyBarriers: Opioid crisis driving high amputation rates

regions.name: Eastern Kentucky
regions.nearestHospital: Pikeville Medical Center (no CPO services confirmed)
keyBarriers: Coal economy decline reduced healthcare infrastructure

regions.name: Mississippi Delta
regions.nearestHospital: Local clinics; nearest major: Baptist Memorial Memorial, Memphis
keyBarriers: MS did not expand Medicaid — highest uninsured rate in state
Predominantly Black population with existing healthcare disparities

summary.overallVerdict: Complete prosthetic care desert across all three regions — systemic, not marginal

osmNote: OSM data for rural prosthetic/orthotic-specific providers (CPO) is sparse; some providers may exist but not be mapped. Hospital/clinic counts based on OSM amenity tags.
